reviews.review_description: I've lost interest in Beat Saber, but this got me right back into the VR rhythm game groove. Supports custom levels right out of the gate, so no need for mods, fun gameplay dynamic, and speed modifiers to intensify gameplay to your liking!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review , glad you like it ^_^

reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun , I needed a break from beat sabor and the other beat like games. Has a lot a fun upbeat songs to play.  Nothing is better then hiting the notes and dancing to it at the same time.  Definitely recommend this game if like these types of games.

developer_response.body: Thank you, glad you like it

reviews.review_description:
I really hope you enjoy the game
if you need any help or wanna provide feedback, join me on Discord:
https://discord.gg/MEcbBRAfNk

Thanks ^_^
